EventsCalendar.title: Event calendar
EventsCalendar.description: Discover all the gaming events near you
EventsCalendar.cta:
Use the "Near me" feature to discover events near your location.
Log in to personalize your experience and follow your favorite places and games.

ctaFollowLairs.description: Discover the shops and gaming spaces near you

ctaFavoriteGames.description: Select the games that interest you to see their events
